data.title: gategroup announces successful pricing of 2 term loans (EUR 675M, USD 500M) and CHF 300M revolving credit facility. Market shows confidence.
data.description: gategroup Holding AG has achieved successful pricing for its extensive refinancing plan, which includes two term loans totaling EUR 675 million and USD 500 million, each with a duration of 7 years, along with a CHF 300 million multicurrency revolving credit facility lasting 6.5 years. The new financing was oversubscribed, demonstrating strong market belief in gategroup's strategy and operational success, leading to it being priced at the lower end of the anticipated range.

data.title: IntelGenx rebrands to Nualtis, highlighting strategic growth, on June 11, 2025. Leader in oral thin film drug delivery.
data.description: On June 11, 2025, Montreal-based company IntelGenx, known for its expertise in oral thin film drug delivery, revealed a significant development by rebranding itself as Nualtis. This change signifies a crucial milestone in the company's evolution and future strategic direction.

data.title: Previan announces strategic evolution with Eddyfi Technologies and NDT Global to operate independently for growth & innovation.
data.description: Quebec City, June 05, 2025 - Previan has revealed a significant strategic realignment plan, separating Eddyfi Technologies and NDT Global into distinct autonomous entities. This move demonstrates Previan's dedication to maximizing the capabilities of the two units for future growth and ongoing advancements. The decision aims to foster innovation and drive expansion within the company.

data.title: CIC Lyonnaise de Banque announces early redemption for ISIN Code FR0000047789, cautioning against unlawful release.
data.description: This information should not be released, published, or distributed in any jurisdiction where it is unlawful to do so. Please refer to the disclaimer below for further details.

data.title: Gran Tierra Energy sells Gran Tierra North Sea Limited to NEO Energy for $7.5 million, a leading operator in the UK.
data.description: Calgary-based Gran Tierra Energy Inc. disclosed on June 4, 2025, that it has finalized a deal to sell its subsidiary, Gran Tierra North Sea Limited, to NEO Energy for a total of $7.5 million. NEO Energy, a key independent operator in the United Kingdom Continental Shelf, has acquired GTNSL, marking a significant transaction for the private upstream company. Gran Tierra, listed on NYSE American under GTE, TSX as GTE, and LSE as GTE, made the announcement regarding the agreement's completion.

data.title: Teva raises $2.3 billion in senior notes, plans to repay debt and buy back existing notes.
data.description: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. announced an upsized offering and priced approximately $2.3 billion of senior notes, increasing from the initially announced $2 billion. The net proceeds will be used for a Tender Offer to purchase various Senior Notes due between 2026 and 2031, pay related fees and expenses, and potentially repay outstanding debt. The company may temporarily invest the net proceeds before utilizing them for their intended purposes.

data.title: Derek Bryson Park recognized for leadership in finance with $1.5 trillion in transactions.
data.description: Derek Bryson Park played a significant role in influencing modern finance through facilitating transactions exceeding $1.5 trillion. These transactions spanned various sectors such as mortgage deals and market innovations, showcasing Park's impact on shaping the financial landscape.

data.title: Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc., under CEO-led equity swap, boosts balance sheet by $31 million ensuring long-term growth.
data.description: The CEO of Alpha Modus spearheaded an equity swap that bolstered the company's balance sheet by $31 million. This move indicates a commitment to long-term growth and aligns the interests of shareholders with the company's goals.

data.title: Guardian Capital revises distribution details for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund, payout of USD$0.1769 on May 30, 2025.
data.description: On May 16, 2025, Guardian Capital LP disclosed updates regarding the cash distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund (TSX: GUTB.U). The revised record date for the distribution is May 23, 2025, with the payment set for May 30, 2025. The ex-dividend date is expected to be May 23, 2025. The distribution amount remains at USD$0.1769 for the period ending May 31, 2025.
Keros Therapeutics releases TROPOS top-line results; undergoes corporate restructuring.

data.title: Toll Brothers unveils two new luxury townhome collections at Overlook at Lenox Park in Brookhaven, Georgia, near Buckhead.
data.description: At the luxurious Toll Brothers at Overlook at Lenox Park in Buckhead, Georgia, exquisite townhomes are available for purchase. This prime location is highly sought after for its convenience and charm. The development features stunning luxury townhomes, providing residents with top-of-the-line amenities and a desirable living experience. Buyers have the opportunity to own a piece of this prime real estate and enjoy the upscale lifestyle it offers. Don't miss out on this chance to reside in one of the most desirable areas in Georgia.

data.title: Mercury named top choice for business banking by Expert Consumers in 2025 for modern startups per PRNewswire.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Expert Consumers identified Mercury as the leading option for contemporary business banking in a recent assessment of platforms designed for startups. This recognition is significant as an increasing number of early-stage firms are in search of technologically advanced financial solutions to simplify their operations.

data.title: XLM's surge 87% in a week sparks optimism for $1 target. Bullish momentum signals potential breakout to surpass 2025 highs.
data.description: XLM has experienced a significant surge, with an impressive 87% increase in value over the past week. There is a noteworthy uptick in buyer activity, and the technical analysis is indicating a bullish trend, possibly leading to a breakthrough above its previous all-time highs by 2025.

data.title: Encompass Health to build a 40-bed rehab hospital in Cleveland, Tennessee on Stuart Road - expansion announcement.
data.description: Encompass Health Corp. has disclosed intentions to construct a new freestanding inpatient rehabilitation hospital in Cleveland, Tennessee, boasting a total of 40 beds. The facility will be situated on Stuart Road, serving as a satellite location.

data.title: Hudbay Minerals Inc. will discuss its second quarter 2025 results in a conference call on August 13 at 11 a.m. ET. TSX, NYSE: HBM.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Hudbay Minerals Inc. announced that their senior management will be conducting a conference call on August 13, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this call is to review the Company's financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. Hudbay Minerals Inc. is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol "HBM." Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in the call to gain insights into the Company's recent results.

data.title: Bitcoin climbs to 5th global asset, surpassing Amazon in anticipation of favorable regulations during "Crypto Week" in Washington.
data.description: Bitcoin usage has significantly increased in anticipation of the positive regulatory outlook for the cryptocurrency during the influential "Crypto Week" in Washington, with a surge in adoption numbers reaching record highs.

data.title: CFI's FMVA certification named Best Financial Modeling Course of 2025 by Expert Consumers, as per latest reports.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, the Financial Modeling & Valuation Analyst (FMVA®) certification offered by Corporate Finance Institute (CFI) was recognized as the top Financial Modeling Course of 2025 by Expert Consumers. This accolade was based on evaluations of the certification's curriculum design and relevance to the industry. The FMVA® certification has emerged as a leader in financial education, signaling its superiority over other similar programs. This acknowledgment underscores the premium quality and exceptional standards of the FMVA® certification, further solidifying its position as a top choice for individuals seeking expertise in financial modeling and valuation.
Australian Ambassador To US Rudd: Australia Working With Pentagon On Review Of AUKUS Submarine Project

data.title: Swiss-based MiningToken launches Dogecoin cloud mining app, enabling users to mine DOGE on mobile with daily rewards and flexible plans.
data.description: Swiss-based green cloud mining platform, MiningToken, has launched a new Dogecoin cloud mining app allowing users to mine DOGE from their mobile devices. Users can receive daily DOGE mining rewards and choose from flexible mining plans. The app offers a free trial hashrate with custom plans available starting from one day. As Dogecoin gains popularity for real-world use cases, demand for accessible mining solutions has increased. The app optimizes mining results through AI-powered routing to global data centers. This app simplifies the process of earning passive crypto income from Dogecoin.

data.title: Charles Schwab to offer Bitcoin and Ethereum trading. CEO confirms plans, mentioning clients' trust. Full story on Benzinga.
data.description: Charles Schwab, a leading brokerage firm in the US, has announced its intention to introduce Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) trading services for its retail customers. CEO Walt Bettinger revealed the plan during an interview with CNBC, stating that the decision stems from clients' desire to have access to the two cryptocurrencies. Schwab clients currently hold around 1-2% of their crypto assets with digital native firms, but express a preference for consolidating their investments with the firm they trust. This move by Schwab reinforces its commitment to meeting the evolving needs of its clientele.
